---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CATastrophe
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 🎯 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🔍 Problem It Solves
What problem or need does this feature address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
How do you envision this working? Be as detailed as possible.

## 🗺️ Roadmap Alignment
Which phase/milestone from the [Roadmap](../ROADMAP.md) would this fit into?
- [ ] Phase 1: MVP Polish (Months 1-2)
- [ ] Phase 2: Content Expansion (Months 3-5)
- [ ] Phase 3: Progression & Replayability (Months 6-8)
- [ ] Phase 4: Technical Excellence (Months 9-11)
- [ ] Phase 5: Polish & Release (Month 12)
- [ ] Phase 6: Post-Launch (Months 13+)
- [ ] Not sure / New addition

## 🎨 Mockups or Examples
Add any mockups, drawings, or references that help illustrate the feature.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other solutions or approaches have you thought about?

## 📊 Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Game is incomplete without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve the game
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## ℹ️ Additional Context
Any other information, screenshots, or context about the feature.
